Home.hero-subtitle: Nearshore software development agency in Puebla, Mexico | AI automation & custom engineering
Home.About-us: At Idealy.ly, we blend technology and creativity to develop software that turns challenges into opportunities. We are a team passionate about innovation, committed to simplifying processes, optimizing experiences, and building tools that make a difference.
Home.About-us2: We believe in the power of technology to improve lives and empower businesses. That’s why we design tailor-made solutions—from intuitive apps to scalable platforms—always with a human-centric approach and a clear purpose: to make the complex simple and the innovative accessible.
Home.About-us3: Ready to bring your ideas to life? Together, we can create change.
Home.subtitle-services: Ideas that scaled. Realities that perform.
Home.text-development: At Idea.ly, we don’t just write code; we build the foundations of your growth. Leveraging a cutting-edge stack with Go for high-concurrency backends and Next.js for ultra-fast user experiences, we ensure your infrastructure is robust, secure, and fully compliant with the performance standards of the North American market.
Home.bullet1: High-Performance Architecture: Systems optimized for speed, stability, and zero downtime.
Home.bullet2: Nearshore Synergy: Real-time collaboration by sharing your timezone (CST/EST)
Home.bullet3: World-Class Engineering: Clean, documented, and scalable code that follows global best practices.
Home.text2-development: More than just a provider, we're your strategic ally in digital transformation.Request your free quote today and let’s build the perfect solution for your business.
Home.text-MD: Artificial intelligence is no longer just the future; it's the present of operational efficiency. At Idea.ly, we leverage advanced machine learning models and intelligent automation to eliminate repetitive tasks, reduce costs, and scale your operations without scaling your headcount.
Home.text-MD2: AI shouldn’t be an ornament; it should be an efficiency engine. We transform manual bottlenecks into intelligent workflows through custom LLM integrations and autonomous AI agents. We make your business smarter and less complex, allowing your team to focus on high-level strategy while technology handles the execution.
Home.text-MD3: Let us help you integrate AI solutions that directly impact your bottom line, transforming raw data into automated actions. Ready to make your business operate at the speed of thought?
Home.frase-MD: AI integration, Efficiency, and Cost Reduction.
Home.text-consulting: LEO is the heartbeat of Idea.ly—a synthesis of over 10 years of design expertise and cutting-edge AI logic. While our humans build, LEO optimizes.
Home.text-consulting2: Innovation doesn’t have to be complicated—it’s all about strategy. At idea.ly, we use cutting-edge technologies like artificial intelligence to tackle real challenges, streamline processes, and unlock new opportunities. With a practical vision and smart tools, we turn your business hurdles into competitive advantages that fuel growth.
Home.bullet4: Custom AI Agents: Tailored automation for customer success and internal operations.
Home.bullet5: Workflow Optimization: Drastic reduction in operational overhead and manual errors.
Home.bullet6: Data-Driven Decisions: Leveraging advanced language models to turn raw data into actionable insights.
Home.subtitle-ux: Interfaces that remove friction and close sales.
Home.text-ux: Great design is invisible; you just feel it works. With over 10 years of experience leading UX/UI projects, we create digital products where every pixel serves a business purpose. We translate technical complexity into seamless user journeys that convert visitors into loyal customers, blending high-impact aesthetics with conversion psychology.
Home.bullet7: Senior UX Strategy: Human-centered design backed by data and user behavior analysis.
Home.bullet8: High-Fidelity Prototyping: Visualize and test your product before the first line of code is written.
Home.bullet9: Scalable Design Systems: Ensuring visual and functional consistency for brands on the move.
Home.text-grow: Digital marketing is the art and science of promoting your brand online through strategic channels like search engines, social media, email campaigns, and content creation. It’s not just advertising—it’s connecting with the right audience at the right time with the right message.
Home.frase-grow: Data-driven strategies for a competitive edge.
Home.bullet10: Strategic Growth Consulting: Aligning your digital product with long-term business objectives.
Home.bullet11: High-Conversion Funnels: Engineered paths that turn cold traffic into loyal, high-value customers.
Home.bullet12: Performance Analytics: Real-time tracking and optimization to ensure every investment delivers measurable ROI.
Home.frase-ux: UX/UI, Conversion, and 10+ Years of Expertise

HeaderHero.title: We turn great ideas into exceptional software.
HeaderHero.autor: At Idealy, we merge a fresh, innovative approach with robust and secure software development. We are the technology partner your project needs to succeed.

ProjectsList.descpro1: Brought to life a dynamic web platform that simplifies booking hotels, arranging transfers, and discovering unforgettable travel experiences.
ProjectsList.descpro2: Designed a mobile app dedicated to enhancing the padel match experience through intuitive control and score tracking. This project focused on creating a clean and functional interface for players to effortlessly manage their games.

Skills.descS1: I design intuitive user experiences and aesthetic user interfaces. My focus is on usability, accessibility, and effective problem-solving through a user-centered design approach.
Skills.descS2: We accelerate your online growth. Our digital marketing service is designed to help you attract more clients, enhance your brand's visibility, and convert website visitors into sales, leveraging proven strategies across SEO, SEM, social media, and content.
Skills.descS3: Accelerate your digital transformation. We offer strategic consulting to help businesses modernize operations, enhance customer engagement, and unlock new value through technology.

Contact.title: Ready to make it Idea.ly Real
Contact.descCont: Tell us about your challenge. Our team (and LEO) will get back to you within 24 hours

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: At Idea.ly, we take the privacy of our users very seriously. This policy describes how we handle your personal information.
PrivacyPolicy.section1_content: We collect information that you provide to us directly when completing contact forms, such as your name, email address, and phone number.
PrivacyPolicy.section2_content: We use the collected information to respond to your inquiries, send you requested information, and improve our services.
PrivacyPolicy.section3_content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration.
PrivacyPolicy.section4_content: Our site uses cookies to enhance the user experience and analyze site traffic through tools like Google Analytics.
PrivacyPolicy.section5_content: You have the right to access, correct, or request the deletion of your personal data. To do so, you can contact us through the means provided on the site.
PrivacyPolicy.section6_content: We reserve the right to update this policy at any time. Changes will be posted on this page.

ServicesPage.title: Our Services
ServicesPage.subtitle: Engineering and automation solutions designed to transform and scale your business.
ServicesPage.description: We merge cutting-edge technology, artificial intelligence, and user-centric design to create digital products that make a difference.
ServicesPage.cta_title: Ready to take your project to the next level?

software-development.title: Custom Software Development
software-development.subtitle: Engineering, Performance, and Scalability
software-development.description: At Idea.ly, we design and build robust, high-performance software systems that serve as the foundation of your long-term growth. We combine high-concurrency backends in Go and ultra-fast frontends in Next.js to deliver an exceptional user experience.
software-development.hero_phrase: Software engineered without borders, matching global standards.
software-development.feature1_desc: Systems optimized for high concurrency, speed, and zero downtime, ideal for business-critical operations.
software-development.feature2_desc: Real-time communication in your timezone for seamless integration with your current engineering team.
software-development.feature3_desc: We write clean, well-documented software following the most demanding design standards and architectural patterns.
software-development.process1_desc: We model database schemas and cloud topology to support future transaction growth.
software-development.process2_desc: We build functional increments with periodic reviews and constant feedback loop.
software-development.process3_desc: We guarantee quality through exhaustive test suites and continuous automated deployments.

ai-automation.title: AI Agents and Automation
ai-automation.subtitle: Applied intelligence for efficient operations
ai-automation.description: We transform repetitive manual tasks into intelligent workflows. By integrating autonomous AI agents and Large Language Models (LLMs) with advanced knowledge bases (RAG), we drastically reduce operational bottlenecks.
ai-automation.hero_phrase: AI shouldn't be an ornament; it is your business's new productivity engine.
ai-automation.feature1_desc: We design autonomous agents trained to execute operational workflows, resolve complex inquiries, and optimize tasks.
ai-automation.feature2_desc: We connect your current systems (CRM, ERP, databases) using advanced, friction-free automations.
ai-automation.feature3_desc: We implement data analysis systems powered by intelligent models to generate actionable reports and suggestions.
ai-automation.process1_desc: We identify operational bottlenecks and redundant activities perfectly suited for automation.
ai-automation.process2_desc: We develop advanced prompts, RAG integrations, and dedicated api connectors.
ai-automation.process3_desc: We monitor agent interactions to fine-tune accuracy and optimize output quality.

ux-ui-design.title: UX/UI Design and Design Systems
ux-ui-design.subtitle: Elegant interfaces that remove friction
ux-ui-design.description: Premium design is invisible because it flows effortlessly. With over a decade of experience leading digital projects, we create beautiful and easy-to-use interactive interfaces that drive conversion and customer loyalty.
ux-ui-design.hero_phrase: We translate technical complexity into intuitive and memorable user experiences.
ux-ui-design.feature1_desc: Deep research and behavioral analysis to design optimal user flows backed by real data.
ux-ui-design.feature2_desc: Visualize and interact with your exact digital product before committing software development resources.
ux-ui-design.feature3_desc: We create consistent component libraries in Figma and code to ensure visual coherence and accelerate development.
ux-ui-design.process1_desc: We understand the end-user, their needs, and the priority business objectives.
ux-ui-design.process2_desc: We outline the main interaction paths and layout structure without aesthetic distractions.
ux-ui-design.process3_desc: We add the brand styling layer, micro-interactions, and prepare all assets ready for development.

digital-marketing.title: Digital Marketing and Growth
digital-marketing.subtitle: Growth strategy and high-converting funnels
digital-marketing.description: Digital marketing is a precision science. We design and implement automated funnels that attract qualified audiences and predictably convert them into high-value loyal customers, maximizing ROI.
digital-marketing.hero_phrase: Data-driven strategies to give you a long-lasting competitive advantage.
digital-marketing.feature1_desc: We analyze your digital channels and customer lifecycle to identify hidden acquisition opportunities.
digital-marketing.feature2_desc: We engineer the end-to-end customer journey, from first impression to final deal closure.
digital-marketing.feature3_desc: We establish a clear measurement ecosystem to track customer acquisition cost and lifetime value in real time.
digital-marketing.process1_desc: We study your sector and the most relevant search queries to capture qualified organic traffic.
digital-marketing.process2_desc: We configure and refine paid campaigns based on conversion rates and acquisition costs.
digital-marketing.process3_desc: We constantly test copy variations, designs, and offers to incrementally improve your ROI.

consulting.title: Digital Transformation Consulting
consulting.subtitle: Practical strategy driven by technology and LEO
consulting.description: Successful innovation requires direction and purpose. We help you modernize internal operations, redesign customer experiences, and adopt software and AI tools that accelerate business benefits.
consulting.hero_phrase: Meet LEO: Our Applied Intelligence dedicated to business optimization.
consulting.feature1_desc: We deploy LEO (our consulting AI) to audit and suggest infrastructure improvements in record time.
consulting.feature2_desc: We redesign your company's IT architecture to eliminate legacy systems and reduce recurring costs.
consulting.feature3_desc: We ensure your team masters new tools through practical hands-on training and interactive documentation.
consulting.process1_desc: We conduct a complete diagnosis of your operations and the current state of your technology.
consulting.process2_desc: We create a strategic plan with initiatives prioritized by return on investment and technical ease.
consulting.process3_desc: We guide you step-by-step in the adoption of the new software and measure impact on your KPIs.

LeoPage.hero_title: Meet LEO: Your AI Strategic Consultant
LeoPage.hero_subtitle: It's not just a chatbot. It's the synthesis of over 10 years of engineering and design expertise, powered by the most advanced language models on the market.
LeoPage.what_is_leo_desc: LEO is Idea.ly's applied intelligence system. It analyzes your business model, detects operational bottlenecks, and delivers precise technical recommendations to scale your company at a fraction of the cost of traditional consultancies.
LeoPage.process_1_desc: LEO processes your company's information and market status to find inefficiencies invisible to the naked eye.
LeoPage.process_2_desc: We identify the manual processes costing you money and time, designing automated solutions.
LeoPage.process_3_desc: We deliver an actionable technical roadmap: from autonomous agents to high-performance applications.
LeoPage.benefit_1_desc: Automate repetitive tasks and drastically reduce your operating expenses.
LeoPage.benefit_2_desc: Decision-making backed by real-time analysis of large volumes of information.
LeoPage.benefit_3_desc: A strategic consultant that never sleeps, ready to scale your operation whenever you decide.
LeoPage.cta_desc: Book a strategic session with our team and let LEO show you the future of your company.
